commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=20c0db8a8ff13d18026e6a8bd4b106c88badc953)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Lobster workflow storage and gateway methods, inline/published workflow execution, nested `openclaw.invoke` plumbing through `runtime.tools.invoke`, TaskFlow gateway protocol methods, owner-only tool-policy wiring, tests, and docs.

PR surface: Source +1671, Tests +1138, Docs +127. Total +2936 across 33 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source inspection: the PR adds `tasks.flows.*` descriptors and handlers, while the PR-head Gateway dispatcher still lists only the three existing task methods. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer API/security-boundary review; there is also a small concrete dispatcher fix required before the feature can work.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
